items.title: The Celtics have reportedly shown trade interest in Cameron Johnson, per Michael Scotto.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
The Celtics have reportedly shown trade interest in Cameron Johnson, per Michael Scotto.

Johnson last season: 12.2 PPG, converted on 43% of his 4.7 3PAs

Johnson is on an expiring $23.06 million contract.

Lots of great intel below from Scotto.

items.title: The Sky have signed Aicha Coulibaly to a rest-of-season contract, the team announced today.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
The Sky have signed Aicha Coulibaly to a rest-of-season contract, the team announced today.

As a developmental player, Coulibaly had already been activated for 10 of the 12 games she was eligible under her previous deal.

items.title: Some Bulls free agency options I like:
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt:
Some Bulls free agency options I like:

- Sandro Mamukelashvili: Stretch big who can handle, been on this one for months
- Bones Hyland: Cheaper than Simons and would add some sorely-needed pull-up shooting
- Kevin Huerter:  Off-ball 3P volume, maybe he'll hit shots again someday
